mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM person_info WHERE is_deleted = 0
AND (name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR id_card_tail = #{keyword} OR phone_tail = #{keyword})
AND person_type = #{personType}
ORDER BY CASE person_type WHEN 'wanted' THEN 1 WHEN 'focus' THEN 2 WHEN 'drug' THEN 3 WHEN 'correction' THEN 4 ELSE 5 END, created_at DESC
